history_draft.text: Parent/guardian reports fever in a [age] for [duration]. [Temperature pattern if reported]. [Feeding and oral intake status]. [Activity level and alertness]. [Urine output]. [Associated symptoms: cough, rhinorrhoea, vomiting, diarrhoea, rash if any]. [Relevant negatives reviewed]. [Additional history].

clinical_blockers: The baseline viral-fever diagnosis label and viral aliases remain unsupported unless clinician-stated.
Medication, antibiotic, hydration, sick-note, and fixed follow-up content is not promoted by this mapping.
